promoted_facts.fact: Interest rate on overdue amounts is 18% per annum or max lawful rate (FA Section 16.15)
promoted_facts.source_reader_report: Pass E — noted as 1.5%/month in Item 6

promoted_facts.fact: General release in FA Section 16.8 covers all claims on or before Effective Date, except FDD representations. Survives termination.
Consent standard: franchisor may withhold consent in business judgment; franchisee's sole remedy is specific performance/declaratory judgment, NOT money damages (FA Section 16.6)
promoted_facts.source_reader_report: Not in reader report narrative — discovered in depth pass

promoted_facts.fact: Indemnification survives expiration/termination (FA Section 14.5). Broad scope including guest injuries, IP claims, government fee disputes. Exception only for gross negligence/willful misconduct per final judgment.
promoted_facts.source_reader_report: Pass B — partially noted in Item 6

promoted_facts.fact: Economic downturn or financial inability is NOT a defense to breach (FA Section 16.10)
Auditor report signed March 18, 2025 from Tysons Corner, Virginia — confirming Note 9 date 'March 18, 2024' is a typo
Confidentiality of negotiated terms (FA Section 16.18) — any negotiated fee reductions or modifications are confidential
